The '''Jante''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Jante]]. They were locked in an arms race against the nearby [[Freda (species)|Freda]], who eventually attacked Jante industrial plants on [[Rett II]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], led by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Haveland/Legends|Haveland]], ordered a ceasefire, from which the Freda eventually withdrew.
